calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Sep-18-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
APPELLANT ADNAN JWEINAT'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES. Attorney fees awarded in the amount of $3000.00 as reasonable fees in enforcing settlement agreement. Request for fees incurred beyond enforcement is denied. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189=(301/PJB/PM)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-12-2006 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Subpoena And For Protective Order
Off Calendar Mar-23-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Joseph Wood, appeared for Respondent/Moving party
Trina S. Roderick, appeared for Appellant/Opposing party

Ruling:
Hearing held on Respondent's Motion To Quash Subpoena and For Protective Order. Ruling after hearing: GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Granted as to deposition to Abdullah - Protective order Granted as to Deposition of Respndent - Written Discovery allowed. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With The Deposition Subpoena Of Basheer Abdullah;
Off Calendar Mar-23-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
Joseph Wood, appeared for Respondent/Moving party
Trina S. Roderick, appeared for Appellant/Opposing party

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Appellant's Motion To Compel Compliance With The Deposition Subpoena Of Basheer Abdullah is denied. The court finds that the discovery sought through the proposed deposition of Basheer Abdullah can be obtained from Respondent and that the deposition of Abdullah is unduly burdensome and expensive, taking into account the needs of the case and the amount in controversy. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-31-2006 Continued To May-15-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
